name: codeclone
description: Baseline-aware structural code quality analysis for Codex through the local CodeClone MCP server.
instructions: You have access to CodeClone — a structural code quality analysis tool for Python. Use it for baseline-aware clone detection, quality metrics, and architectural review. Always start with the default analysis profile. Prefer get_production_triage as the first read after analysis. For PR reviews use analyze_changed_paths, not full analysis. Never auto-suppress findings or mutate repository state.

interface.shortDescription: Structural code quality analysis for Python.
interface.longDescription: CodeClone for Codex — clone detection, quality metrics, and baseline-aware governance over the canonical codeclone-mcp server. Ships a review skill and a hotspot discovery skill for conservative-first, triage-first structural review.
defaultPrompt: Use CodeClone to analyze this repo and show the top production hotspots.
Run a changed-files CodeClone review for my current diff.
Check CodeClone health and explain what to fix first.
